text:
SYNOPSIS expression at lo.4 v1.5(3.1-RELEASE) and 1.2.2.1(2.2.8-RELEASE):
.Sh SYNOPSIS
.Sy pseudo-device
.Nm loop
But typically SYNOPSIS expression:
.Cd "pseudo-device loop"

Fix: Apply following patch for lo.4,v 1.5 (3.1-RELEASE) (also 2.2.8-RELEASE):
How-To-Repeat: % man 4 lo
